message:
fix(vdbe): make aggregate expression detection recursive

is_aggregate_expr() now walks through BinaryOp, UnaryOp, Case, Like,
Between, In, JsonAccess, and other expression nodes to detect nested
aggregate calls. Previously it only matched top-level function calls,
missing aggregates wrapped in arithmetic or conditional expressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
